<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Translation\Provider; use Symfony\Component\Translation\Exception\IncompleteDsnException; use Symfony\Component\Translation\Exception\UnsupportedSchemeException; interface ProviderFactoryInterface { /** * @throws UnsupportedSchemeException * @throws IncompleteDsnException */ public function create(Dsn $dsn): ProviderInterface; public function supports(Dsn $dsn): bool; }
